rulings.Case Title: 1369 HYDE STREET, LTD VS. WILLIAM B. REILLY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Protective Order
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 16, 2014, line 5. (Part 2 of 3) DEFENDANT MEGHAN REILLY Mtn For Protective Order: DENIED. Defendant is entitled to depose minor plaintiffs who allege pain, upset stomach, sleepless nights, anxiety, fear, humiliation and emotional distress caused by defendant's actions shall sit for a deposition. Request to allow Barbara Reilly to sit in at William Reilly's deposition is denied. This request is not specified in the Notice of Motion. No sanctions. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1369 HYDE STREET, LTD VS. WILLIAM B. REILLY et al

rulings.Case Title: VICTOR TUNG VS. AMI QI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-13-647062 WITH CASE CGC-13-531599
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 16, 2014, line 7. PLAINTIFF VICTOR TUNG MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-13-647062 WITH CASE CGC-13-531599: DENIED in part and GRANTED in part. Motion to consolidate is DENIED. Motion to stay is GRANTED. Unlawful detainer 647062 action is stayed pending the resolution of title issue in 531599. Victor Tung shall post daily damages in the amount of $100 per day (i.e. $700 a week) every Thursday starting January 16, 2014 until the stay is lifted. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANNA WONG VS. CARMEN GARCIA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Written Disco
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 16, 2014, line 8. DEFENDANT CARMEN GARCIA Motion To Compel Written Discovery: GRANTED, subject to opposition. Plaintiff is ordered to provide responses without objections to Form Interrogatories and Supplemental Special Interrogatories within 10 days of notice of entry of order. No sanctions. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BARNEY DIAMOS VS. LISSETTE OSORIO
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 16, 2014, line 9. DEFENDANT LISSETTE OSORIO DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT: SUSTAINED with leave to amend to reconcile allegations in 6b and 6f. Demurer is otherwise overruled. Complaint sufficiently alleges unlawful detainer based on nuisance. Defendant raises issues of fact. Defendant fails to cite authority for the proposition that date is a required element of the notice terminating tenancy. Plaintiff's Request for Judicial Notice is denied. = (501/REQ)
